note: MOCK DATA for the v0 mockup, hand-written in the exact shape the future export script will emit. Contains only table-revealed content per the secrets rule.

party.name: The Lima Sisters
party.goldNote: We will count our gold at the next game!

sharedItems.name: The Ancient Field Log
sharedItems.text: An old explorer's notebook full of clues.

sharedItems.name: The Wayfinder Prism
sharedItems.text: A crystal that turns light into rainbows.

sharedItems.name: Pouch of Star-Seeds
sharedItems.text: Tiny seeds that glow like stars. 3 uses left.

sharedItems.name: Mom's Letter
sharedItems.text: Sealed with purple wax. It is from Mom!

sharedItems.name: The Torn Letter
sharedItems.text: From Odbert's box. Part of it is missing.

sharedItems.name: The Shield-Boss Stone
sharedItems.text: A shimmering stone. It fits the picture on the cavern wall.

heroes.name: Rainbow with Clouds
heroes.tagline: An elf healer. Her staff glows with rainbow light.

abilities.name: Searing Light
abilities.text: Shoot a beam of light at a monster up to 4 squares away.

abilities.name: Healing Touch
abilities.text: Remove 1 damage from yourself or a friend next to you.

abilities.name: Potion Brewer
abilities.text: After a battle, refill 1 potion that you or a friend used.

spells.name: Crescent Moon Shield
spells.text: You and friends next to you get 1 extra armor die for 2 turns.
spells.limit: After you cast it, the moon must rest for 3 turns.

items.name: Ring of Sisters Lima
items.text: Worn on her hand. It glows when the sisters are together.

heroes.name: Sky-Saver
heroes.tagline: Strong and brave. She hits hard and protects her sisters.

abilities.name: Cloud-Cutter Strike
abilities.text: Swing your blade at a monster right next to you.

abilities.name: Knockback Attack
abilities.text: Attack with 1 less die. If you hit, push the monster back 4 squares.

abilities.name: Retaliation
abilities.text: If a monster hurt you and you hit it back, deal 2 damage.

spells.name: Meteor Strike
spells.text: Leap high and smash the ground. Monsters within 2 squares must dodge or take 1 damage.
spells.limit: You cannot use it two turns in a row.

items.name: Ring of Sisters Lima
items.text: Worn on her hand. It glows when the sisters are together.

heroes.name: Night Armor
heroes.tagline: A knight with a magical shield. She is joining the adventure soon!

abilities.name: Celestial Strike
abilities.text: Strike a monster right next to you.

abilities.name: Radiant Shield Bash
abilities.text: The next monster beside you attacks with 1 less die. Then hit it with 1 die.

abilities.name: Defender
abilities.text: When a friend next to you is hit, you can take the damage instead.

pets.text: Some new friends are waiting to meet you at the next game!

quests.name: Seek the Forgotten Strongholds
quests.text: Mom said do not follow her. Find the old strongholds of our people instead.

quests.name: The Sealed Path
quests.text: Silas's old map shows a high mountain pass marked with our crest. The elders say to stay away. Why?

quests.name: First Bell Repairs
quests.text: The sheriff needs our help fixing the town when the first bell rings.

quests.name: Keep Bree Safe
quests.text: Bree is hiding at Moira's. She owes us a favor.

journal.title: We Are the Lima Sisters
journal.text: We helped Odbert and saved Roger. Odbert gave us a secret box from Mom. Inside were magic rings. The rings showed us the truth. We are sisters of the Lima Clan!

journal.title: Mom's Secret
journal.text: Mom is alive and she is very brave. She is leading the Usurper far away from us. The Usurper's sign is a dark eclipse. We saw it on the cavern wall. Our clan's sign is a crescent moon and a sunburst.

journal.title: The Fire in Rivenshore
journal.text: Fires broke out in town but we put them out. We kept Bree safe at Moira's sanctuary. Moira gave us our first spell cards. Rainbow got Crescent Moon Shield and Sky-Saver got Meteor Strike!
